entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a nutrient-rich food legume valued for its cooking oil

entities.name: FATTY ACID CONTENT
entities.description: The major determinant of the quality of edible oil in peanut

entities.name: HIGH OLEIC/LINOLEIC FATTY ACID RATIO
entities.description: A target trait in advanced breeding programs for improved shelf life and health benefits

entities.name: AHFAD2A
entities.description: A mutant allele on linkage group a09 that controls fatty acid composition

entities.name: AHFAD2B
entities.description: A mutant allele on linkage group b09 that controls fatty acid composition

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used for the introgression of FAD2 mutant alleles

entities.name: SUNOLEIC95R
entities.description: A peanut variety used as the source of FAD2 mutant alleles

entities.name: ICGV06100
entities.description: A high oil content peanut breeding line used as the recurrent parent

entities.name: OLEIC ACID
entities.description: A monounsaturated fatty acid whose increase is targeted for improved oil quality

entities.name: LINOLEIC ACID
entities.description: A fatty acid whose reduction is targeted for improved oil quality

entities.name: PALMITIC ACID
entities.description: A fatty acid whose expression was observed to be stable in introgression lines

entities.name: GERMINATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A seedling trait that showed a significant difference between high oleic and normal oleic peanuts

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A productivity trait that was higher in marker-assisted backcrossing-introgression lines

entities.name: FOLIAR FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases to which the introgression lines showed resistance

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A specific type of foliar fungal disease

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A specific type of foliar fungal disease

entities.name: SEEDLING TRAITS
entities.description: General category of traits including germination percentage
